heading: BSON.BSONRegExp
body:
The `BSON.BSONRegExp` type represents a [regular expression](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Guide/Regular_Expressions). You can use a
`BSON.BSONRegExp` object with the `$regex` query operator to
[perform a regular expression query](atlas-query-operators-regex) on a
MongoDB collection.

Constructs a `BSON.BSONRegExp` object from a regular expression
string. You can optionally specify configuration flags.

```typescript
BSON.BSONRegExp(pattern: string, flags: string)
```

| Parameter | Type   | Description                                     |
| --------- | ------ | ----------------------------------------------- |
| pattern   | string | A regular expression pattern.                   |
| flags     | string | Optional. One or more regular expression flags. |
